hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '(primer-pp\.user\.js|/dist/)'; then echo 'BLOCK: 这是构建产物，请编辑 src/ 或 lib/ 下的源码。' >&2; exit 2; fi

file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .filePath // empty'); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '/lib/.*\.js$'; then cd /home/shallow/04.AI-Prism/05.Gemini-Ultra-Toolkit && npm test 2>&1 | tail -8; fi
